description.en: Returns a string describing this device (for example "External USB Webcam").

excerpt.es: Returns a string describing this device (for example "External USB Webcam").
excerpt.en: Returns a string describing this device (for example "External USB Webcam").

description.en: Returns a string containing a user agent-assigned label that identifies the track source, as in"internal microphone". The string may be left empty and is empty as long as no source has been connected. When the track is disassociated from its source, the label is not changed.

excerpt.es: Returns a string containing a user agent-assigned label that identifies the track source, as in"internal microphone". The string may be left empty and is empty as long as no source has been connected....
excerpt.en: Returns a string containing a user agent-assigned label that identifies the track source, as in"internal microphone". The string may be left empty and is empty as long as no source has been connected....

description.en: A Boolean that istrueif thelatencyconstraint is supported in the current environment.

excerpt.en: A Boolean that istrueif thelatencyconstraint is supported in the current environment.
